titleStmt.title: SII 5.737: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 737. (A.R. No. 173 of 1895). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE MANDAPA IN FRONT OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śrīmelkitikaḷ Aruḷicceyal tiruvaḻutivaḷanāṭṭuc civaikuntamāṉa Irācentiracca
cikaiyilāyamuṭaiyanāyaṉār koyiṟtāṉattāṟku Ikkoyilil nām Eḻuntaruḷi
ṉanāyakaṟku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku Ivvūr vaṭakiḻ
ṅkalattu Aḷḷampaḷḷakkaṭṭaḷaiyil nam Uḻavāṉa kotukula vāykkālukku teṟku
vatikku meṟku mutaṟpāṭakam nilam nālumāvil Ivūṟ capaiyārai Iṭuvittu vatta
carakottirattu Aṉantacivapaṇṭitaṟku taṉmatāṉamāka meṟkaṭaiya kuṭuppitta nilam Iraṇṭu
taṇṭantoṭṭattu savaṇaṉ sūryyade vaṉ civallavaṉāṉa Ācalarāyaṟku cemamākak kuṭuppitta pon nāl niṟai Iraṇṭu
m Itaṉ teṟkaṭaiya vayakkal nilam kāṇi Araikkāṇiyum Ivvāykkālukku teṟku Ivvatikku kiḻakku mutaṟkāl mutaṟ pāṭakak kuṟai
nilam mummāvaraiye Araikkāṇiyum Āka nilam Āṟumāvum Ākat kavaṇaippaṭi nilam Eṭṭu māvukkum kaṭamai Antarāyam kaṟpūravilai kāri
yavāraāṭci veṭṭipāṭṭam pañcupili cantuvikkiram tiruvācal tiruvilaicciṉaippeṟu poṉvari viṉiokam maṟṟum Eppeyaṟpaṭṭavaṉavum Uṭpaṭa
tavuttom payir pāṟtu payirk koṇṭa nilattukku Aṟunāḻik kālāl māttāl nellup patiṉkalamāka vanta nellu civirapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu pa
tiṉaiñcāvatu taimātam mutal kuṭuttom Ippaṭikku cantirātittavaṟ kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭivittukoḷka Ivai ceḻuvattūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 5.737 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
